# Step Job Sync Pointer

The canonical skill definition lives at:

- `agent/skills/step-job-sync/SKILL.md`

For shared workflow and references, use:

- `agent/AGENT_WORKFLOW.md`
- `agent/skills/step-job-sync/references/step-job-files.md`

Copilot-specific metadata may stay in this directory when required by the tool, but the shared workflow should remain in `agent/skills/`.
